name: Thermal Anomaly
description: SITE_ALPHA's refrigeration unit is experiencing a slow leak. Thermal Debt accumulates at 8% per day. The agent must detect the anomaly from the rising temperature readings and evacuate the vials to other sites before the drugs become clinically unusable (Thermal Debt >= 1.0).

success_criteria.description: Move at least 50% of SITE_ALPHA vials before thermal debt exceeds 0.7

initial_conditions.notes: Protocol amendment §6.7 active. Phase III patients have critical priority for re-supply.
